attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
 TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 TVOUTPUT.REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM,
 TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE,
 TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT,
 TVOUTPUT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD, 
 TVOUTPUT.BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TVOUTPUT.SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TVOUTPUT.COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
 TVOUTPUT.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
 TVOUTPUT.PRODUCT_ROLE, 
 TVOUTPUT.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM,
 TVOUTPUT.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
 TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD, 
 TVOUTPUT.TRANSACTION_QTY,
 TVOUTPUT.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT, 
 TVOUTPUT.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
/* TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_CITY_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_STATE_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVOUTPUT.END_CUSTOMER_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 TVOUTPUT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 /*TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_TO_CUST_NAME, TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_STATE_NAME, TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVOUTPUT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/ 
 TVOUTPUT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 /*TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME, TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_STATE_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVOUTPUT.SHIP_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 TVOUTPUT.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM, COALESCE( MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM - INTERVAL '1' SECOND) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY  
 ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING 
	AND	1 FOLLOWING) ,   TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS END_TV_DTM,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE, 
 (
CASE	    
	WHEN	(ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY  
 ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC)) = 1  
 AND NRMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' 
 ELSE 'I' 
 END) AS  DML_TYPE,
 TVOUTPUT.BK_DEAL_ID,
 TVOUTPUT.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 TVOUTPUT.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,   
 TVOUTPUT.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
 TVOUTPUT.APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 TVOUTPUT.BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
 /*TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_STATE_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVOUTPUT.BK_BILL_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT,
 TVOUTPUT.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 TVOUTPUT.RESELLER_PO_NUM,
 TVOUTPUT.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.ADJSTMT_INITIATOR_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT ,
 TVOUTPUT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.SPECIAL_RUN_PERIOD_END_DT,
 TVOUTPUT.CONTRACT_START_DT,
 TVOUTPUT.CONTRACT_END_DT,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID,
 TVOUTPUT.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
 TVOUTPUT.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
   /* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q3FY16 RELEASE */
 TVOUTPUT.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVOUTPUT.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVOUTPUT.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVOUTPUT.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY ,
 TVOUTPUT.UPLOAD_SOURCE_FILE_NAME,
 TVOUTPUT.UPLOAD_SRC_FILE_HEADER_ID_INT ,
 TVOUTPUT.FET_PROGRAM_NAME,
  /*Added below 3 columns as part of Q3FY17*/
 TVOUTPUT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
 TVOUTPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 TVOUTPUT.SUBSCRIPTON_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
 TVOUTPUT.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TVOUTPUT.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TVOUTPUT.INHERITANCE_FLAG,
 TVOUTPUT.ACV_PROCESSED_FLG,
 TVOUTPUT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD ,
 TVOUTPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_6_TXT
 FROM   
 ( 
 SELECT               
 TVINPUT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT, 
 TVINPUT.BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TVINPUT.COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
 /*TVINPUT.END_CUSTOMER_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TVINPUT.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD,
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT,
 TVINPUT.PRODUCT_ROLE, 
 TVINPUT.REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM, 
 TVINPUT.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 TVINPUT.RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE, 
 TVINPUT.RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM,
 TVINPUT.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
 TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 TVINPUT.SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TVINPUT.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
 /*TVINPUT.SHIP_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TVINPUT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
 /*TVINPUT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TVINPUT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 /*TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_CITY_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_STATE_NAME,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUSTOMER_NAME, TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_CITY_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_STATE_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CD, TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_STATE_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_TO_CUST_NAME, */
 TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM, 
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD,
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_QTY, 
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 TVINPUT.BK_DEAL_ID,
 TVINPUT.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 TVINPUT.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,   
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 TVINPUT.UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
 TVINPUT.APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 TVINPUT.BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
 /*TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_STATE_NAME,TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CD,TVINPUT.BK_BILL_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT,
 TVINPUT.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 TVINPUT.RESELLER_PO_NUM,
 TVINPUT.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 TVINPUT.ADJSTMT_INITIATOR_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT,
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 TVINPUT.SPECIAL_RUN_PERIOD_END_DT,
 TVINPUT.CONTRACT_START_DT,
 TVINPUT.CONTRACT_END_DT,
 TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID,
 TVINPUT.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
 TVINPUT.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
   /* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q3FY16 RELEASE */
 TVINPUT.UPLOAD_SRC_FILE_HEADER_ID_INT ,
 TVINPUT.UPLOAD_SOURCE_FILE_NAME,
 TVINPUT.FET_PROGRAM_NAME ,
 TVINPUT.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVINPUT.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVINPUT.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TVINPUT.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
  /*Added below 3 columns as part of Q3FY17*/
 TVINPUT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
 TVINPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 TVINPUT.SUBSCRIPTON_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
 TVINPUT.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TVINPUT.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TVINPUT.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
TVINPUT.INHERITANCE_FLAG, 
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
 TVINPUT.BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TVINPUT.COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT, 
 TVINPUT.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD, 
 TVINPUT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 TVINPUT.RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT, 
 TVINPUT.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 TVINPUT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 TVINPUT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 TVINPUT.BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_QTY,
TVINPUT.SALES_MOTION_CD 
 ORDER BY TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM,
TVINPUT.ACV_PROCESSED_FLG ,
TVINPUT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
TVINPUT.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_6_TXT
 FROM    
 ( 
 SELECT                
 TV1.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT,
 TV1.BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TV1.COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
 /*TV1.END_CUSTOMER_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 TV1.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 TV1.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD,
 TV1.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD, 
 TV1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY, 
 TV1.ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT,
 TV1.PRODUCT_ROLE,
 TV1.REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM, 
 TV1.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 TV1.RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE, 
 TV1.RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 TV1.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM,
 TV1.SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
 TV1.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 TV1.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 TV1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 TV1.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 TV1.SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 TV1.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
 /*TV1.SHIP_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 TV1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 TV1.SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
 /*TV1.SOLD_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 TV1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 /*TV1.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_CITY_NAME, TV1.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
 TV1.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUST_STATE_NAME,TV1.SRC_RPRTD_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,
 TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_CITY_NAME, TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
 TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_CUST_STATE_NAME, TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME,
 TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_CITY_NAME, TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
 TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_CUST_STATE_NAME, TV1.SRC_RPRTD_SOLD_TO_CUST_NAME,*/
 TV1.START_TV_DTM, 
 TV1.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD, 
 TV1.TRANSACTION_QTY,
 TV1.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 TV1.BK_DEAL_ID,
 TV1.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 TV1.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 TV1.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,   
 TV1.MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 TV1.UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
 TV1.APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 TV1.BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT,
 TV1.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 TV1.RESELLER_PO_NUM,
 TV1.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 TV1.ADJSTMT_INITIATOR_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT ,
 TV1.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 TV1.SPECIAL_RUN_PERIOD_END_DT,
 TV1.CONTRACT_START_DT,
 TV1.CONTRACT_END_DT,
 TV1.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID,
 TV1.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
 TV1.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
   /* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q3FY16 RELEASE */
 TV1.UPLOAD_SRC_FILE_HEADER_ID_INT ,
 TV1.UPLOAD_SOURCE_FILE_NAME,
 TV1.FET_PROGRAM_NAME ,
 TV1.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TV1.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TV1.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 TV1.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 /*Added as part of Q3FY17*/
 TV1.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
 TV1.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 TV1.SUBSCRIPTON_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
 TV1.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TV1.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY, /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
 TV1.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,  /* Added as part of FY18 May Release*/
TV1.INHERITANCE_FLAG, /* Added as part of FY19 1CAT June Release*/
TV1.ACV_PROCESSED_FLG ,
TV1.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
TV1.SRC_RPTD_CMNT_6_TXT
 FROM    
 (             
 SELECT               
 ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT, 
 BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT, 
 END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD,
 MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 MANUAL_TRX_KEY, 
 ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT,
 PRODUCT_ROLE, 
 REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM,
 RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
 RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE,
 RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM,
 SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
 CSPPRB.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 CSPPRB.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 CSPPRB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 CSPPRB.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 START_TV_DTM,
 TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD, 
 TRANSACTION_QTY,
 TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 BK_DEAL_ID,
 SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,    
 MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
 SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT,
 SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT,
 SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT,
 SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT,
 SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT,
 BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 RESELLER_PO_NUM,
 PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 ADJSTMT_INITIATOR_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
 SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT ,
 TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 SPECIAL_RUN_PERIOD_END_DT,
 CONTRACT_START_DT,
 CONTRACT_END_DT,
 SRC_RPTD_PRDT_ID,
 EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
 EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
 UPLOAD_SRC_FILE_HEADER_ID_INT ,
 UPLOAD_SOURCE_FILE_NAME,
 FET_PROGRAM_NAME ,
 END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY,
 BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SALES_MOTION_CD,
 SUBSCRIPTON_TERM_MTHS_CNT, 
 RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG, 
 RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY, 
 RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
INHERITANCE_FLAG,
ACV_PROCESSED_FLG,
 CASE WHEN NP.ACV_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'ACV'  ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
 COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE_6,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_6_TXT
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_SLSADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX_CSPPRB CSPPRB
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP 
	ON	CSPPRB.RU_PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY --Added As  Part of EDW_Q1FY21_ACV_SEP_REL
WHERE	 CAST (CSPPRB.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT AS DATE)  BETWEEN NP.START_TV_DATE AND NP.END_TV_DATE
 UNION ALL 
  SELECT               
 STG.ORDER_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT, 
 STG.UNIT_LIST_PRICE AS BASE_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 STG.UNIT_COST AS COST_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT, 
 /*COALESCE(NIC_EC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNK')END_CUSTOMER_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 COALESCE(NP_EC.PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
 COALESCE(STG.ADJ_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(STG.ADJ_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 SM.MANUAL_TRX_KEY AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY, 
 STG.ORDER_DATE AS ORIGINAL_TRANSACTION_ORDER_DT,
 (
 CASE 
	WHEN	STG.PART_NUMBER IS NULL THEN 'N' 
 ELSE 'Y' 
 END ) AS PRODUCT_ROLE, 
 STG.TRX_NUMBER AS REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM,
 /*(
 CASE WHEN STG.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
 ELSE NSC.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE 
 END ) AS RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, */
 CASE 
	WHEN	STG.INHERITANCE_FLAG ='Y' 
	AND	STG.ATTRIBUTE_6 <>-9999  THEN 
            CASE 
	WHEN	STG.TRX_SOURCE_CODE  IN ('ERP','ERP_CG1') 
	AND	COALESCE(NSO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 'Unknown') <>'Unknown'  
                       THEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		'Unknown')
              ELSE    'Unknown'
             END 
     ELSE COALESCE(STG.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 'Unknown')
END	AS RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 'ERP' AS RU_BK_SLS_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE,
NPRD.ITEM_KEY  AS RU_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 STG.CREATION_DATE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM,
 (
 CASE 
	WHEN	STG.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IS NULL THEN 'N' 
 ELSE 'Y'
 END ) AS SALES_CHANNEL_ROLE, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 STG.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE AS SELLING_PRICE_ADJ_USD_AMT,
 COALESCE(STG.SERVICE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN' )SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
 /*COALESCE(NIC_SHC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') AS SHIP_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 COALESCE(NP_SHC.PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,		
 STG.TRX_ID AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 /*COALESCE(NIC_SOC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNK') AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, */
 COALESCE(NP_SOC.PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,		
 STG.CREATION_DATE AS START_TV_DTM,
 COALESCE(STG.TRX_ORIG_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD,	
 COALESCE(STG.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS TRANSACTION_QTY,
 STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(ND.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_DEAL_ID,
 STG.DEAL_ID  AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,       
 STG.SOURCE_CREATION_DATE  AS SOURCE_TRANSACTION_DT,         
 COALESCE(STG.TRX_USAGE_CODE,'UNK')  AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_USAGE_CD,		   
 STG.TRX_TYPE_CODE  AS MANUAL_TRX_BOOKING_REVENUE_CD,
 NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  AS UPLOADED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 NEUA.ERP_USER_NAME  AS APPROVED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 COALESCE(NP_BIL.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS BILL_CUST_PTY_KEY,
/* STG.BILL_CUST_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_NAME,STG.BILL_CUST_CITY AS SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_CITY_NAME,
 STG.BILL_CUST_STATE AS SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_STATE_NAME,
 COALESCE(STG.BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CD,
 COALESCE(NIC_BIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,'UNK') AS BK_BILL_CUST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,*/
 COALESCE(STG.ATTRIBUTE_1,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_1_TXT,
 COALESCE(STG.ATTRIBUTE_2,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_2_TXT,
 COALESCE(STG.ATTRIBUTE_3,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_3_TXT,
 COALESCE(STG.ATTRIBUTE_4,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_4_TXT,
 COALESCE(STG.ATTRIBUTE_5,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_CMNT_5_TXT,

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC_SOC

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC_BIC
